encounters.assessment: Pregnancy at 28 weeks with elevated blood pressure. Rule out pre-eclampsia.
encounters.plan: Check urine protein, FBC, LFT, counsel danger signs, refer if severe features.

encounters.chiefComplaint: Headache and dizziness for three days
encounters.plan: Review adherence, renal function, ECG, adjust antihypertensive after clinician review.

encounters.assessment: Suspected malaria with dehydration. Under-5 high risk.
encounters.plan: RDT, oral rehydration if tolerated, urgent referral if lethargy/persistent vomiting.

orders.item: Refer to General Hospital Mangu if danger signs persist
